name: SELECT2
fullName: Trial of Endovascular Thrombectomy for Large Ischemic Strokes
teachingPoint: Supports EVT for large-core; large core is no longer an automatic exclusion.

name: ANGEL-ASPECT
fullName: Endovascular Therapy for Acute Ischemic Stroke with Large Infarct
teachingPoint: Confirms EVT benefit in large-core population.

name: RESCUE-Japan LIMIT
fullName: Endovascular Therapy for Acute Stroke with Large Ischemic Region
teachingPoint: First major RCT to support large-core EVT.

name: TENSION
fullName: Endovascular Thrombectomy for AIS with Established Large Infarct
teachingPoint: European replication of large-core EVT benefit.

name: LASTE
fullName: Thrombectomy for Stroke with a Large Infarct of Unrestricted Size
teachingPoint: Thrombectomy benefits even very large infarcts (ASPECTS ≤5), at the cost of more sICH.

name: ATLAS
fullName: Endovascular Thrombectomy for Large-Core Ischaemic Stroke up to 24 h — Systematic Review and IPD Meta-analysis with Central Imaging Adjudication
teachingPoint: Consolidates EVT benefit across large-core strata to 24 h, except very extensive cores (≥150 mL) beyond 6 h where evidence remains limited.
